notes: Multiple critical bugs: sfx function is redefined and broken (hop sound never plays), frog rendering uses pixel coords inconsistently (frog.x/frog.y not initialized causing NaN), platform carrying logic assigns to 'p' via 'p=onPlatform' in wrong context, row-to-zone mapping is inverted (road/river backgrounds drawn incorrectly), and the home detection uses row>11 but frog movement caps at row 11, making the game nearly unwinnable.
Core movement and hazards exist, but home/top-row logic and frog-on-platform handling are inconsistent enough to make this a clearly flawed Frogger build.
